description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle featuring a wooden stock with a smooth, polished finish and a long, slender metal barrel. The stock is a rich brown color, likely made from hardwood, and extends to a slightly curved butt for shoulder support. The barrel and receiver are metallic, with a dark, matte finish, and the rifle is equipped with simple iron sights. The trigger guard and bolt handle are also visible, both made of metal. The rifle appears to have an internal magazine, with no detachable box or drum visible. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for hunting or historical military use.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and long metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, and metal barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and the rounded stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the continuous wooden stock.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the stock and barrel, with the trigger guard visible.
